title: get_contacts and get_spaces: N queries for N IDs
description: Store::get_contacts(Some(ids)) and Store::get_spaces(Some(ids)) issue one SELECT per id in a for loop. A JMAP batch with ids=[id1, id2, ..., idN] fires N round-trips. At scale (N=50, which is below MAX_CALLS_IN_REQUEST=64) this is 50 SELECTs where 1 IN clause would do. Fix: use SELECT ... WHERE id IN (?,?,?) via sqlx QueryBuilder or build the IN clause for the batch path.
